supersedes: v1.6 (review cycle 7, 2026-07-17: WITHHELD, 14 findings — recurrences: provenance placeholder, dir-fsync silence).
status: DRAFT. No Stage-3 instance has been run.

corrections_from_review_v7.1_provenance_placeholder_in_manifest: CLOSED_BY_DEVELOPMENT_TEST (recurrence fixed properly) — corpus_source now RETURNS (rows, hash, row_manifest, corpus_provenance); _orchestrate_inner refuses BEFORE any manifest exists if provenance is incomplete, and inserts the ACTUAL pre-capture observations into the manifest document before the bytes are generated; no post-hoc patching; no stdout-only path
corrections_from_review_v7.2_artifacts_not_semantically_qualified: CLOSED_BY_DEVELOPMENT_TEST — load_realism_pass (record_type, verdict PASS, preflight_passed, cases_pass, evidence_persisted) + load_final_test_report (record_type, exit 0, ZERO skips, clean tree, admissible_as_final) are mandatory entry preconditions; a Phase-B-bound FAIL or skipped-test report is refused
corrections_from_review_v7.3_crypto_boundary_unenforced: PARTIALLY CLOSED / OPEN_IN_LAUNCH_ATTESTATION — the entry now REQUIRES a launcher verification RECEIPT (load_verification_receipt: record type, verification_exit_status==0, tool hash, key id, bound to the ACTUAL attestation bytes; receipt hash bound in Phase B via launch_verification_receipt_sha256); producing the signed attestation + receipt with the trusted key remains launcher-side
corrections_from_review_v7.4_payload_hash_not_verified: CLOSED_BY_DEVELOPMENT_TEST — canonical_signed_payload_sha256 is format-validated AND recomputed from the FROZEN canonical unsigned payload (all fields minus {signature, canonical_signed_payload_sha256}, sort_keys separators-compact utf-8); mismatch refused
corrections_from_review_v7.5_attested_claims_unobserved: OPEN_IN_LAUNCH_ATTESTATION — command/mount/nonce/launcher-identity verification against observed runtime state belongs to the launcher-generated attestation + receipt
corrections_from_review_v7.6_schema_not_closed: CLOSED_BY_DEVELOPMENT_TEST — binding rejects unexpected keys (closed allowed set)
corrections_from_review_v7.7_flat_hashes: PARTIALLY ADDRESSED — semantic requirements now enforced by the loaders (which is what the structured entries were for); full structured per-artifact entries deferred to the countersigned Phase-B instance
corrections_from_review_v7.9_stale_last_provenance: CLOSED_IN_CODE — function-global state ELIMINATED; provenance is an explicit return value
corrections_from_review_v7.10_late_provenance_check: CLOSED_BY_DEVELOPMENT_TEST — checked before the manifest is written; a missing provenance leaves NO manifest behind
corrections_from_review_v7.11_run_manifest_indirection: CLOSED_IN_CODE — realism_pass_sha256, final_test_report_sha256, launch_verification_receipt_sha256 recorded directly in run provenance
corrections_from_review_v7.12_env_snapshot: OPEN_IN_IMAGE (acknowledged) — single-observation Env preservation ships with the in-image run
corrections_from_review_v7.13_derivation_document: OPEN_AT_COUNTERSIGNATURE — expression-level map (2/t_i→T_POSITIVE, sqrt→T_POSITIVE, A_ub@z→AUB_2D_NCOLS, dual slices→BUB/BEQ/UPPER, bounds→UPPER_NONNEG) accompanies final adjudication
corrections_from_review_v7.14_dir_fsync_silent: ACKNOWLEDGED (dev-Windows limitation) — honest note retained; in-image Linux runs perform true directory fsync; durability flags deferred to the in-image writer

remaining_before_execution_countersignat: OPEN_IN_LAUNCH_ATTESTATION: signed attestation + verification receipt produced by the launcher (trusted key, frozen tool); observed-state claims (command/mount/nonce)
OPEN_AT_COMMIT: final commit + tree; Phase-A manifest + test report regenerated there
OPEN_IN_IMAGE: full OCI digest; realism PASS; final report with production-binding RUN + zero skips; single-snapshot Env
OPEN_AT_COUNTERSIGNATURE: countersigned pins/authorization/Phase-B instances; expression-level contract derivation
scope_boundary: This package authorizes NOTHING to execute. MR002_Implementation_Erratum_v1.0 remains SUSPENDED; the quarantined AMENDED PASS remains non-reusable; preflight CLOSED; performance NOT COMPUTED; validation and sealed OOS SEALED AND UNREAD.
